ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES region ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the mortality data belongs to */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate of the country */,
  "increase_mort" REAL /* Increase in mortality rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_data" (
  "smoke_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the smoking data belongs to */,
  "smoke_prev" REAL /* Smoking prevalence of the country */,
  "increase_smoke" REAL /* Increase in smoking prevalence */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoke_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_pollution_data" (
  "air_pollution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air pollution data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the air pollution data belongs to */,
  "CO" REAL /* CO level of the country */,
  "uplift_CO" REAL /* Uplift in CO level */,
  "O3" REAL /* O3 level of the country */,
  "uplift_O3" REAL /* Uplift in O3 level */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("air_pollution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_pollution_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the economic data belongs to */,
  "GDP_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., mortality, smoking prevalence, air pollution) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., mortality, smoking prevalence, air pollution) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., mortality, smoking prevalence, air pollution) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  "createdBy_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "updatedAt" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_createdBy_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("createdBy_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
